form.formComment: Drawn the inside alley. At the last start finished 5th in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 4 over 390m at this track behind Market Jet beaten 10 lengths (23.02). Capable of taking this out.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and fell turning into back straight.

form.formComment: Placed last time (22.69) at this track in a Rank Limit - Grade 5, finishing third and beaten 4 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and two places from five starts. Looks a leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Ran a better race when second behind Rolling Express at this track last start over 390m (22.70). Gets back so might need a bit of luck.

formComments.comment: Ran a better race when second behind Rolling Express at this track last start over 390m (22.70). Gets back so might need a bit of luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Visibly eased and turned head outwards approaching winning post.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when second (22.80) over 390m at this track. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (17.32) over 300m at Healesville. Awkwardly drawn but is in the mix.

form.formComment: Form has been strong, including a victory two starts back. Last time out finished 2nd in a Special conditions H on March 31 over 425m at Bendigo behind Aston Exclusive beaten half a length (24.33). Happy to risk this time.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth over 390m at this track, beaten 7 lengths (22.93) behind Belgium Slice in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 4. Prefer to watch at this stage.

formComments.comment: Last start finished fifth over 390m at this track, beaten 7 lengths (22.93) behind Belgium Slice in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 4. Prefer to watch at this stage.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Ballarat (22.80) in a Grade 5, finishing a 8 length seventh. Goes well out of this box with a win and five minors. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at his last three starts, most recently over 390m at Ballarat. Has ability and worth including.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Checked off heels on home turn galloped.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in her races, Last start finished eighth over 425m at Bendigo, beaten 14 lengths. Looks up against it this time.
